creator: dgeo@centrale-med.fr
text:
Here we are affected since our upgrade to 14.2 on two machines (PowerEdge R440 with 231.0.153.0 AND 227.0.134.0 firmwares)

2025-02-25T14:04:10+01:00 shirley kernel: Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
